entry.title: IDC VA797H17D0024 (P00063) awarded to GE PRECISION HEALTHCARE LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO IMPLEMENT EXECUTIVE ORDER THE CLASS DEVIATION IDENTIFIES SEVERAL CLAUSES THAT WILL NEED TO BE REMOVED AND/ OR DEVIATED FROM OUR CURRENT CONTRACTS IN ACCORDANCE WITH FAR 52.212-4C. PLEASE SEE ATTACHED. ALSO TO ADD TWO ADDITIONAL NEGOTIATORS TO THE CONTRACT TO SUBMIT REQUEST FOR INSPECTION AND ACCEPTANCES. BRITTANY ALBA DIEGO SANTIBANEZ FERNANDEZ

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IMAGING EQUIPMENT AND SUPPLIES: MEDICAL, DENTAL, VETERINARY

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
